creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
On 1/25/10, Stephen Montgomery-Smith <stephen@missouri.edu> wrote:
> Dear bf,
>
> I am the current maintainer of plotutils.  Would you be interested in
> taking over maintainership of plotutils?  I am happy either way.
>
> If you are interested, I'll just say "yes" to your patch.  Otherwise
> I'll have to check it out, which might take a few days as I am somewhat
> busy this week.
>
> Stephen
>

Well, if you really feel overburdened, I'll take it over rather than
see it orphaned.  But I don't think a few days is going to matter in
this case.

Regards,
                b.
